archetypes_defined.Heritage Anchor: Deeply rooted in Saudi/regional cultural identity. Heritage-first visual and voice. Najdi/Hejazi dialect dominant. High hospitality cue density. Identity is inseparable from product.
archetypes_defined.Modern Premium: Aspirational, polished, cool-toned. English-Arabic mixed or MSA. Minimal hospitality cues. High production quality. Speaks to upward mobility and contemporary taste.
archetypes_defined.Community Warm: Audience-first. UGC, giveaways, engagement mechanics dominant. Warm, playful, casual voice. High comment engagement. Brand is the hub of a social community.
archetypes_defined.Occasion Specialist: Content calendar is heavily occasion-driven. >40% of posts tied to specific occasions (Ramadan, National Day, sports). Pattern repertoire changes dramatically by season.
archetypes_defined.Mass Market Functional: Volume-driven. Price offers, product bundles, delivery CTAs dominate. Low cultural signal. Broad audience targeting. Conversions > connections.
